title: WATCH:  Uber previews its 'air taxi' service
fullText: Uber previews its 'air taxi' serviceABC News' Sam Sweeney breaks down Uber's program "air taxi" which is expected to hit the market in Dubai later this year.February 25, 2026
summary: ABC News' Sam Sweeney breaks down Uber's program "air taxi" which is expected to hit the market in Dubai later this year.
